verse_text: Yes, and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution.

pericope.title: The Pastor's Defense Against Apostasy: Loyalty to Tradition

links.context: Joseph's holiness cost him his freedom. "Yes, and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution" ([[2TI.3:12]]).

Ps 82 prophesies that all who hate Christ (v. 3) will also persecute His saints (vv. 4- 9; see also [[JOH.15:18]]; [[2TI.3:12]]). Various nations mentioned (vv. 7-9) represent the kinds of persecutors who seek to destroy the Church. Even avowed enemies find a common ground of unity in order to persecute the Church (v. 6). But the Church is taught how to pray in times of persecution (vv. 10-19), and even some of these enemies are converted to the Lord (v. 17).
